case_title: EDENILSON RUBEN CANAS VS. GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CANAS, EDENILSON RUBEN AS TO DEFENDANT GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, GABINO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS  OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TORRES, MARIA  INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CANAS, EDENILSON RUBEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP GARCIA, GABINO INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS  OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP TORRES, MARIA  INDIVIDUALLY AND AS GENERAL PARTNERS OF GARCIA'S JANITORIAL, A GENERAL PARTNERSHIP $9,567.48 PRINCIPAL, $37.07 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,829.55, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
